Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Algorithm Visualizer 177 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. Microbenchmarking Chipsets for Giggles 41 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Jury says Meta knowingly harmed children for profit, awarding landmark verdict 126 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. Show HN: I built a site that maps the web from a bounty hunter's perspective 20 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. VNDB founder Yorhel has died 152 upvotes, 24 comments
  6. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 559 upvotes, 115 comments
  7. Meta and YouTube Found Negligent in Landmark Social Media Addiction Case 41 upvotes, 4 comments
  8. Hubble Snaps a New Dazzling Photo of the Crab Nebula 36 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 400 upvotes, 114 comments
  10. My Astrophotography in the Movie Project Hail Mary 382 upvotes, 121 comments
  11. Flighty Airports 467 upvotes, 162 comments
  12. Quantization from the Ground Up 34 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. Slovenian officials blame Israeli firm Black Cube for trying to manipulate vote 304 upvotes, 118 comments
  14. Building a coding agent in Swift from scratch 45 upvotes, 12 comments
  15. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 393 upvotes, 171 comments
  16. Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church 44 upvotes, 13 comments
  17. Local LLM App by Ente 258 upvotes, 113 comments
  18. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 862 upvotes, 462 comments
  19. Apple Business 702 upvotes, 393 comments
  20. Antimatter has been transported for the first time 163 upvotes, 81 comments
  21. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 278 upvotes, 180 comments
  22. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 131 upvotes, 79 comments
  23. Goodbye to Sora 983 upvotes, 733 comments
  24. Thoughts on Slowing the Fuck Down 189 upvotes, 124 comments
  25. Sony V. Cox Decision Reversed 67 upvotes, 38 comments
  26. Arm AGI CPU 394 upvotes, 288 comments
  27. Tracy Kidder, Author of 'The Soul of a New Machine,' Dies at 80 13 upvotes, 4 comments
  28. Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines 112 upvotes, 98 comments
  29. Data centers are transitioning from AC to DC 239 upvotes, 298 comments
  30. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 206 upvotes, 273 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 26 March 2026. Source here.
